meta.title: Anastasia Melnikova — portfolio
meta.description: Portfolio: websites, interfaces, and digital projects. Vibe Coder / AI-first web designer.

contactDialog.title: Write an email
contactDialog.subtitle: Your message will be sent by email. If you prefer, you can also use Telegram.
contactDialog.sent: Email sent. I’ll get back to you.
contactDialog.failed: Couldn’t send. Please try again or use Telegram.
contactDialog.failedConfig: Mail isn’t available from the site right now. Please use Telegram below.

ideaDialog.title: Choose what feels closest to your task
ideaDialog.subtitle: First, pick a direction: what we can build, which blocks it needs, and what action it should lead to. Then you can discuss the selected idea.
ideaDialog.requestGreeting: Hi! I want to discuss this idea:
ideaDialog.launchFirst: Offer, strong visual, short product explanation, and a clear request button.
ideaDialog.launchBlocks: Problem, solution, benefits, buying path, testimonials, contacts.
ideaDialog.launchGoal: Explain value quickly and lead to a request.
ideaDialog.expertFirst: Expert face, positioning, experience, and booking button without filler.
ideaDialog.expertBlocks: Services, approach, cases, trust, testimonials, prices or work formats.
ideaDialog.expertGoal: Build trust and sell higher-ticket work calmly.
ideaDialog.portfolioFirst: Who you are, what you do, and why your work can be trusted.
ideaDialog.portfolioBlocks: Cases, process, skills, testimonials, clear contact path.
ideaDialog.portfolioGoal: Show your level and turn work views into conversations.
ideaDialog.promoFirst: One campaign, event, or service with a fast entry into the point.
ideaDialog.promoBlocks: Value proposition, offer details, deadline, benefits, request form.
ideaDialog.promoGoal: Collect requests for a specific launch or ad campaign.
ideaDialog.appFirst: A clear product screen: what the person does and what result they get.
ideaDialog.appBlocks: Scenarios, roles, interface, account area, reports, statuses, notifications.
ideaDialog.appGoal: Build a useful tool for work or clients, not just a showcase.
ideaDialog.customFirst: We shape your idea into the right format: site, promo, interface, or app.
ideaDialog.customBlocks: Structure, user flow, visual style, integrations, and contact points.
ideaDialog.customGoal: Turn a raw request into a clear project plan.

footer.offerLead: Privacy policy and public offer — in one panel.
footer.paymentLead: Secure checkout on the provider’s page.
footer.contactsLead: Channels and the contacts page with details.
footer.cookie: By continuing to use this site, you consent to the processing of cookies in accordance with the Privacy Policy on cookie use, the use of recommendation technologies, and you agree to the terms of personal data processing and protection.

home.heroTitle: I build websites, interfaces, and digital projects that feel like a vibe — and work like a system
home.heroSubtitle: Not just “ship some layout”, but shape feeling, style, logic, and presentation so the project feels worth opening, scrolling, and remembering.
home.aboutTitle: I assemble the impression at the intersection of code, visuals, UX, and AI
home.aboutSubtitle: For me, a website isn’t a stack of blocks. It’s the feeling of the project, rhythm, presentation, and how a person feels inside the interface. My approach is fast, beautiful, and intentional.
home.what1Text: Sites that don’t merely “exist” — they capture attention, keep rhythm, and guide people through meaning.
home.what2Text: Pages that show not only work, but style, character, and level.
home.what3Text: When you need not just a site, but a feeling: atmosphere, character, mood, presentation.
home.what4Text: I use neural networks to accelerate and amplify ideas — not as a substitute for thinking.
home.what5Text: I think through how people read, where they look, where they get lost, and where they decide.
home.what6Text: I can assemble a strong first version quickly — without months of endless approvals.
home.how1Text: I look at the task and the feeling the project should communicate.
home.how2Text: A beautiful site without logic is just a pretty wrapper — so I shape meaning, scenario, and user path.
home.how3Text: With style and logic in place, the build becomes faster, sharper, and stronger.
home.featuredMelanoDesc: A digital showcase for a music project: atmosphere, navigation, and content presentation.
home.featuredNeiroDesc: A direction website: structure, visual tone, and a cohesive digital space.
home.featuredSalievaDesc: A personal site/portfolio with calm editorial delivery focused on materials.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Short notes on speed, attention to detail, and how the finished page feels.
home.testimonial1Quote: She shipped a landing page I actually want to revisit—visuals and logic both land. She got the brief fast, without endless process.
home.testimonial2Quote: Finally a site I’m not embarrassed to drop in an investor chat. Clear structure, calm tone—it reads premium.
home.testimonial3Quote: We got a strong first version very quickly, then only refined details. Rare mix of speed and taste.
home.whyTitle: Why people come for more than code
home.whyLead: Because I can see the project as a whole.
home.whyNotOnlyItems: how to build it|how to code it|which stack to use|how to make it responsive
home.whyButAlsoItems: how to present it|how it will be perceived|where the eye will catch|what people will remember|why it will feel more expensive than it costs
home.audienceItems: experts|creators|digital projects|AI products|studios|anyone who needs a site with character|anyone who refuses a bland template page
home.manifesto: A good website isn’t when it’s “nicely coded”. It’s when the project gains energy, form, and a sense of being alive.
home.finalTitle: If you need a site that looks strong and feels modern — let’s build it
home.finalBody: I can help with concept, structure, packaging, and implementation — from the first vibe to a finished page.

portfolioPage.title: Real case studies: the brief, what shipped on the site, and the client outcome
portfolioPage.lead: Not a screenshot gallery: each project shows the client goal, what was built on the page, and the outcome.
portfolioPage.melanomusicIntro: A site for an AI musician and songwriter: from first impression to track listening and request submission.
portfolioPage.melanomusicTask: Package the music project not as a simple about page, but as a service: show style, authorship, work examples, and a way to order a song.
portfolioPage.melanomusicDone: Homepage, song catalog, services section, track cards, request form, contacts, and legal pages.
portfolioPage.melanomusicResult: Visitors understand who the author is, what can be ordered, listen to examples, and move to action without extra questions.
portfolioPage.melanomusicTrust: Shows how a creative project can become a clear website with a commercial scenario.
portfolioPage.neiroIntro: An AI-first website for a practice that helps businesses turn growth into a system: from positioning to automation.
portfolioPage.neiroTask: Package complex expertise without overload: explain AI, services, implementation scenarios, and the path to a request in plain language.
portfolioPage.neiroDone: Built a premium tech visual style, hero section, service structure, interactive budget calculator, case block, certificates, contacts, and request form.
portfolioPage.neiroResult: The site feels confident, explains the value of the practice, and turns interest into a concrete action: a request.
portfolioPage.neiroTrust: Shows how a complex AI direction can become a clear and commercially useful digital product.
portfolioPage.songmuseIntro: A service website for creating music with AI: from song idea to a request for a finished track.
portfolioPage.songmuseTask: Present the music creation service clearly and commercially: available formats, order flow, and what the client receives.
portfolioPage.songmuseDone: Built the homepage, service pages, audio examples catalog, cart, checkout request flow, contacts, and legal section.
portfolioPage.songmuseResult: Visitors can understand the service, listen to examples, choose a work format, and send a music creation request.
portfolioPage.songmuseTrust: Shows AI-service packaging: a creative topic, clear structure, order path, and work with audio content.
portfolioPage.salievaIntro: A site where the goal is not to say everything, but to quickly create a sense of level and trust.
portfolioPage.salievaTask: Build a page that presents the specialist through visual style, clear structure, and calm delivery without overload.
portfolioPage.salievaDone: Hero section with portrait, What I Do block, service navigation, prices, contacts, and careful mobile adaptation.
portfolioPage.salievaResult: Visitors leave with a clear impression: the expert is understandable, the style is readable, and booking feels easy.
portfolioPage.salievaTrust: Shows how a personal site can build trust before the first message.
portfolioPage.runcoffeeIntro: A promo website for a coffee shop: atmosphere, photo-based menu, running club news, quick phone order, and route.
portfolioPage.runcoffeeTask: Present a local coffee shop in a warmer way than a standard catalog page: keep the cozy mood, make the menu easy to browse, and highlight the running community.
portfolioPage.runcoffeeDone: Built the hero section, interactive menu with filters and an order list, trust block, news feed, map, contacts, and mobile adaptation.
portfolioPage.runcoffeeResult: Visitors quickly feel the atmosphere, choose a drink or dessert, open the route, and can call the coffee shop right away.
portfolioPage.runcoffeeTrust: Shows how a local business can become a modern digital storefront without heavy delivery mechanics or unnecessary noise.
portfolioPage.taskplannerIntro: A mobile planner for a manager and team: tasks, assignees, deadlines, voice input, daily summaries, and achievement badges.
portfolioPage.taskplannerTask: The goal was an app where an admin quickly assigns tasks, tracks progress, and sees at the end of the day who completed work, who missed deadlines, and who did not check in.
portfolioPage.taskplannerDone: Built an Android prototype with manual and voice task creation, employee selection, date and time deadlines, Company, Daily Summary, Calendar, Achievements, and Settings screens.
portfolioPage.taskplannerResult: The APK already builds and installs on Android. Next step: server sync, employee registration by company link, shared chat, and automatic evening reports.
portfolioPage.taskplannerTrust: This is more than a showcase: roles, team workflows, deadline control, and motivation through playful badges.
portfolioPage.reportappIntro: A desktop tool for work reports: gather data, turn it into a clearer view, and get the final result faster.
portfolioPage.reportappTask: The reporting flow had too much manual routine: open files, check data, collect the final output, and repeat the same actions again.
portfolioPage.reportappDone: Built the application interface, report-processing logic, and a structure for automation so the user works in one clear window instead of scattered files.
portfolioPage.reportappResult: Reports are prepared faster, manual mistakes are reduced, and the workflow becomes repeatable: open the app, load data, get the result.
portfolioPage.reportappTrust: Shows practical business-focused development: interface, logic, and automation, not just a polished page.
portfolioPage.radaIntro: A demo landing page for spiritual meetings and practices: soft atmosphere, event schedule, quiz, and booking path.
portfolioPage.radaTask: The goal was to present Rada not as a dry service page, but as a living space with trust, mood, and a clear path to booking.
portfolioPage.radaDone: Built the hero, meetings and practices sections, visual moments, state-based quiz, contact form, and mobile adaptation.
portfolioPage.radaResult: Visitors quickly read the mood of the project, choose the format that fits them, and can move to booking without extra steps.
portfolioPage.radaTrust: Shows how a personal expert project can be packaged with care, atmosphere, and a clear request path.
portfolioPage.t2academyIntro: A demo learning platform for T2 trainees: modules, sales cases, tasks, XP, and leaderboard.
portfolioPage.t2academyTask: The goal was to turn training materials and sales scripts into an interface where trainees learn through practice, not long documents.
portfolioPage.t2academyDone: Built learning sections, product scenarios, objection practice, missions, progress, XP mechanics, rating, and quick hints.
portfolioPage.t2academyResult: The platform creates a clear training route: trainees see topics, practice cases, collect progress, and enter real work scenarios faster.
portfolioPage.t2academyTrust: Shows an EdTech approach to corporate training: structure, gamification, and applied scenarios instead of scattered materials.
portfolioPage.taskplannerScreenshotHomeAlt: Android app home screen with today tasks widget
portfolioPage.taskplannerScreenshotCalendarAlt: Android app calendar screen with tasks for the selected date
portfolioPage.taskplannerScreenshotHomeCaption: Tasks widget on the home screen

servicesPage.title: I build websites that bring leads — not just sit online
servicesPage.lead: I choose the format for the task: from a compact business card site and promo page to a landing page, portfolio, multi-page website, online store, app, or growth work for an existing project.
servicesPage.pricingNote: Prices are starting points: the final estimate depends on page count, copy, integrations, catalog, payments, account area, and urgency. After a short brief, we fix a clear scope.
servicesPage.process1Text: What the page must sell and who it is for
servicesPage.process2Text: From the first screen to the lead — no filler
servicesPage.process3Text: Build, QA, hand off a working site
servicesPage.valueBody: Not pretty for pretty’s sake. I think like a user. I ship the site like a product.
servicesPage.closingTitle: I’ll show how your site will look and work
servicesPage.closingPoint1: Clear project structure: steps, timelines, no chaos
servicesPage.closingPoint2: Confidence in how it presents: safe to share with a client or partner
servicesPage.closingPoint3: A finished interface without endless “one more tiny tweak” loops
servicesPage.s1When: You need a polished page for a service, specialist, project, or contacts
servicesPage.s1Result: Hero section, concise packaging, trust block, contacts, and a clear request path
servicesPage.s2When: You have a product, launch, ad campaign, event, or service to sell
servicesPage.s2Result: Offer, structure, benefits, trust, answers to objections, and a request button
servicesPage.s3When: You need to show your level, cases, work style, and build trust before purchase
servicesPage.s3Result: Expert positioning, services, case studies, process, proof points, and contact path
servicesPage.s4When: You need a page for an event, ad campaign, special offer, launch, or single service
servicesPage.s4Result: Fast entry into the point, action focus, deadline, benefits, and a contact form or button
servicesPage.s5When: You need more than one page: services, about, cases, blog, documents, contacts
servicesPage.s5Result: Site structure, navigation, several pages, basic SEO, and one clear system
servicesPage.s6When: You need products, categories, product pages, requests, cart, or payments
servicesPage.s6Result: Catalog, product cards, purchase or request flow, filters, and needed integrations
servicesPage.s7When: You need a prototype, interface, mini-app, or internal workflow logic
servicesPage.s7Result: Screens, user scenarios, clear logic, and a first working version
servicesPage.s8When: The site already works, but needs updates, new blocks, edits, analytics, or growth
servicesPage.s8Result: I keep the site alive after launch: improvements, form checks, updates, and new ideas

contactsPage.title: Tell me what you’re building — we’ll shape it together
contactsPage.intro: Share the context: launch, site, promo, or an AI-first task. I’ll reply on Telegram or via the site form — whichever you prefer.

offerPage.title: Documents
offerPage.lead: Core terms for work, payment, and data processing. These texts are written for an independent specialist website and may be clarified for a specific project.
offerPage.privacyPlaceholder:
I process only the data you send through the contact form or messengers: name, contact details, and message text. This data is used to reply to your request, discuss the project, prepare an offer, and fulfill agreed work.

Data is not sold or shared with third parties, except for services that technically support the website, email, analytics, and payment processing. You can request deletion or correction of your data by contacting me by email or Telegram.

By continuing to use the site, you agree to the use of cookies and technical data needed for the site to work correctly.
offerPage.offerPlaceholder:
The information on this website describes services for creating websites, interfaces, digital projects, and AI-first solutions. The exact scope, timeline, price, and work format are agreed individually before the project starts.

A request through the website or messenger does not automatically create a contract: terms are confirmed after the task is discussed. Payment is made according to the agreed terms.

If a project has already started, any refund is calculated based on the completed scope of work and actual costs incurred.
